name: Wolfhouse Booking Assistant - Message Intake Shadow

meta.description: Phase 18e shadow draft workflow (evolved from Phase 16a). INACTIVE / NOT IMPORTED into production n8n. Test webhook only — never activate for live WhatsApp. Path: Set shadow flags -> IF guard -> parse WhatsApp-style guest payload -> POST /staff/bot/guest-reply-draft -> map suggested_reply/send_eligibility/extraction/validation/dry_run_plan/safety flags -> respond (debug only). Legacy label: was message-intake-preview in Phase 16a. X-Luna-Bot-Token via n8n Header Auth credential Luna Bot Internal Token (staging) — bind at import, never hardcoded. No graph.facebook.com. No api.stripe.com. No booking-create. No payment-link. No Stripe webhook. No live WhatsApp send. No n8n activation.

parameters.responseBody: ={ "error": "shadow_guard_blocked", "detail": "shadow_mode is not true; refusing guest-reply-draft path", "whatsapp_sent": false, "live_send_blocked": true, "sends_whatsapp": false, "calls_n8n": false, "no_write_performed": true }

parameters.jsCode:
// Phase 18e — preserve Staff API guest-reply-draft fields (no WhatsApp send)
const api = $input.first().json;
const parsed = $('Code - Parse Guest Message').first().json;
const se = api.send_eligibility || {};
const extraction = api.extraction || {};

return [{
  json: {
    shadow_mode: true,
    dry_run: true,
    draft_only: api.draft_only !== false,
    preview_only: api.preview_only !== false,
    no_write_performed: api.no_write_performed !== false,
    requires_staff_review: api.requires_staff_review !== false,
    creates_booking: api.creates_booking === true,
    creates_payment: api.creates_payment === true,
    creates_stripe_link: api.creates_stripe_link === true,
    sends_whatsapp: false,
    calls_n8n: api.calls_n8n === true,
    whatsapp_sent: false,
    live_send_blocked: true,
    suggested_reply: api.suggested_reply || null,
    next_action: api.next_action || null,
    send_eligibility: se,
    send_allowed_later: se.send_allowed_later === true,
    requires_staff: se.requires_staff === true,
    auto_send_ready: se.auto_send_ready === true,
    extraction,
    validation: api.validation || {},
    dry_run_plan: api.dry_run_plan || null,
    handoff_required: extraction.handoff_required === true,
    success: api.success !== false,
    client_slug: parsed.client_slug,
    from: parsed.from,
    guest_name: parsed.guest_name,
    language: parsed.language,
    message_text: parsed.message_text,
    channel: parsed.channel,
    staff_api_endpoint: '/staff/bot/guest-reply-draft',
    note: 'Phase 18e: shadow draft — suggested_reply + send_eligibility logged only, no WhatsApp send.'
  }
}];

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ shadow_mode: $json.shadow_mode, dry_run: $json.dry_run, draft_only: $json.draft_only, preview_only: $json.preview_only, no_write_performed: $json.no_write_performed, requires_staff_review: $json.requires_staff_review, creates_booking: $json.creates_booking, creates_payment: $json.creates_payment, creates_stripe_link: $json.creates_stripe_link, sends_whatsapp: $json.sends_whatsapp, calls_n8n: $json.calls_n8n, whatsapp_sent: false, live_send_blocked: true, suggested_reply: $json.suggested_reply, next_action: $json.next_action, send_eligibility: $json.send_eligibility, send_allowed_later: $json.send_allowed_later, requires_staff: $json.requires_staff, auto_send_ready: $json.auto_send_ready, extraction: $json.extraction, validation: $json.validation, dry_run_plan: $json.dry_run_plan, handoff_required: $json.handoff_required, success: $json.success, staff_api_endpoint: $json.staff_api_endpoint, note: $json.note }) }}
